name: colorblock
label: 撞色 / Colorblock
preamble: Bold flat colour-blocking / duotone icons: each icon uses 2 to 3 of the fixed palette colours as overlapping geometric shapes, high but harmonious saturation, Memphis vibe.

construction.fill_rule: flat colour blocks, 2-3 palette colours per icon, overlapping geometric shapes
construction.color_rule: only the locked palette; keep colour roles consistent
construction.shared_parts: reuse one canonical shape per recurring concept

fits: Kids' learning, creative and playful products.
notes: Lock the palette hex or the colours drift between generations.
